Edyan Cruz

About me

I am a Software Engineering student at the University of Puerto Rico Mayagüez with a passion for programming. Currently, I am part of the Software Architecture division at RUMarino, developing an unmanned underwater vehicle (UUV). My areas of expertise include Python, C++, HTML, and CSS, with some experience in C#. I am also proficient in ROS and Bootstrap and am familiar with working on Linux, web servers, and Docker.
